sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports severe pain and bleeding, and is feeling depressed. He reports constipation and weight loss. The patient denies vomiting.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals slight tenderness to palpation of the left lower quadrant. A left adnexal mass is palpated. No rebound tenderness or guarding is noted. The vaginal exam reveals no external lesions, a pink cervix, and no masses on the right side. CT scan shows a 3 cm left ovarian mass with associated local lymph node involvement.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has ovarian cancer, stage three A, based on the CT scan findings and lymph node involvement.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I recommend initiating chemotherapy with cisplatin and taxol after surgical resection. I also recommend performing a lymph node dissection and a hysterectomy. I recommend genetic counseling and testing. I will schedule follow-up appointments to monitor response to treatment and assess for recurrence.
